description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity Scan that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow should have read-all permissions and set environment variables for build concurrency and Coverity project. It should then run a job named Coverity Linux on an ubuntu-latest environment, but only for a specific repository. The job should download the Coverity tool, build with cov-build, archive the build results, and submit them for analysis using the Coverity token and email from secrets.
